name: codex-plugin-builder
description: Guidance for creating, validating, publishing, updating, and troubleshooting Codex skills, plugins, and plugin marketplaces.

interface.shortDescription: Build Codex skills and plugin marketplaces.
interface.longDescription: Provides reusable workflow guidance for creating Codex skills, packaging them as plugins, publishing GitHub marketplace repositories, updating installed skills, and troubleshooting marketplace import failures.
